hero.title: RufTECH Pass
hero.subtitle: Private Password Manager
hero.description: Store passwords locally. No cloud, no tracking, no compromises.

local.title: Local Storage
local.description: Your data stays on your device. No servers ever store your passwords.

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.description: Full transparency. Review every line of code yourself.

selfhost.title: Self-hosting
selfhost.description: Deploy on your own server. Complete control over your infrastructure.

independent.title: Independence
independent.description: No lock-in to Google, Apple, or any other corporation. Your data is yours alone.

cta.heading: Try It Now
cta.description: Create an account and start managing your passwords securely.

about.heading: About the Project
about.description: RufTECH Pass is built by students of ITMO University — the best of the best in information technology. We believe password security should be accessible to everyone.
